title: cotoneaster glacialis
intro: Cotoneaster glacialis is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, Cotoneaster glacialis is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
